title: Don Krieg Sets His Sights on the Baratie
description: On pages 5–8, Don Krieg’s arrival turns the Baratie crisis into a pirate siege while Nami’s departure and the looming fight split the crew’s attention.
scene: The Baratie becomes trapped between hungry enemies, terrified cooks, Krieg’s overwhelming force, and the Straw Hats’ personal priorities.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: To the kitchen,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: SPIT: I think I'm not going to

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: In order to prepare enough food for a 100 people.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sanji?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wise choice...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who the hell do you think you are, Sanji? KrieG's secret agent or something?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We ain't gonna let you take one step in to the kitchen.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've had enough,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: of your insane and reckless actions!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fine, stop me if you wish.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Go ahead, shoot.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I know...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I know that they're nothing but scum who aren't worth a dime saving...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But to me, none of that matters. Thinking about the consequences of feeding a person...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's all such a big hassle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A cook should freely be able to,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Feed anyone who's starving!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Isn't that ideal!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Patty!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hold him down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sanji! I know you feed the customers I chase away from time to time,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And I'm not going to say who was right and who was wrong for all those times...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But this time, it's all your fault!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So don't you dare do any more unnecessary things! I'll protect this restaurant myself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fortunately, we only have Don Krig alone to deal with.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just what can he do against all of us!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is baratie, the restaurant that deals with all sorts of pirates on a daily basis.

summary: This part escalates the Baratie arc from character introduction to open conflict, with Krieg threatening the restaurant and Nami pulling the story toward Arlong Park.
